prompt_text:
### Demographics: 79-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 21 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Mild dyspepsia and bloating

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Mild Cognitive Impairment with early Dementia
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis); HF (No); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~22.5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Donepezil (10 mg nightly)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 45.6 kg; Height 150.3 cm; BMI 20.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 125/74 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.0%; 9 months ago 7.1%; 6 months ago 7.3%; 3 months ago 7.5%; current 7.0%), FPG (12 months ago 173mg/dL; 9 months ago 160mg/dL; 6 months ago 147mg/dL; 3 months ago 172mg/dL; current 173mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 45.9kg; 9 months ago 42.3kg; 6 months ago 43.9kg; 3 months ago 44.9kg; current 45.6kg), Height (12 months ago 150.3cm; 9 months ago 150.3cm; 6 months ago 150.3cm; 3 months ago 150.3cm; current 150.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 20.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 129mmHg; 9 months ago 131mmHg; 6 months ago 131mmHg; 3 months ago 127mmHg; current 125mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 72mmHg; 9 months ago 73mmHg; 6 months ago 75mmHg; 3 months ago 74mmHg; current 74mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 90U/L; 9 months ago 98U/L; 6 months ago 93U/L; 3 months ago 100U/L; current 97U/L), AST (12 months ago 81U/L; 9 months ago 83U/L; 6 months ago 82U/L; 3 months ago 85U/L; current 88U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 8.3mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 7.3mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 6.7mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 5.3mL/min/1.73m²; current 3mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 317mg/g; 9 months ago 326mg/g; 6 months ago 327mg/g; 3 months ago 308mg/g; current 283mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 96mg/dL; 9 months ago 90mg/dL; 6 months ago 89mg/dL; 3 months ago 90mg/dL; current 93mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 57mg/dL; 9 months ago 60mg/dL; 6 months ago 59mg/dL; 3 months ago 57mg/dL; current 58mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 128mg/dL; 9 months ago 144mg/dL; 6 months ago 128mg/dL; 3 months ago 141mg/dL; current 134mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.2g/dL; 9 months ago 10.7g/dL; 6 months ago 11.2g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 10.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.89 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
